en: Listen up, people! Now, for some reason, I fit in the army like one of them round pegs.
It's not really hard. You just make your bed real neat, remember to stand up straight,
and always answer every question with, Yes, Drill Sergeant!
Is that clear? Yes, Drill Sergeant!
What you do is you just drag your nets along the buck.
ko: 그건 바닥에 그물만 끌고 가면 돼.

en: On a good day, you can catch over 100 pounds of shrimp.
ko: 좋은 날에는 100파운드 이상의 새우를 잡을 수 있어.

en: Everything goes all right. Two men, shrimp in ten hours.
That's what you spend on gas. Done, Drill Sergeant!
Gump! Why did you put that weapon together so quickly, Gump?
ko: 왜 그렇게 빨리 무기를 조립했지, 검프?

en: You tell me, Drill Sergeant. Jesus H. Christ!
This is a new company record. If it wouldn't be a waste of such a damn fine enlisted men,
I'd recommend you for OCS, Private Gump.
ko: 너를 OCS에 추천할 거야, 프라이빗 검프.

en: You are going to be a general someday, Gump! Now, disassemble your weapon and continue!
ko: 너는 언젠가 장군이 될 거야, 검프.
